headline: Starbucks’ Stock Down 17% In Five Years
summary: Brian Niccol has brought fresh energy to Starbucks, but a recovering brand still faces a relentless army of rivals and a stock that trails the broader market by a wide margin over five years. Can momentum alone close that gap?

raw.headline: Starbucks’ Stock Down 17% In Five Years
raw.summary: Brian Niccol has brought fresh energy to Starbucks, but a recovering brand still faces a relentless army of rivals and a stock that trails the broader market by a wide margin over five years. Can momentum alone close that gap?

headline: Can Project Fresh Stabilize Wendy's EBITDA Amid Weak Traffic?
summary: WEN targets EBITDA stabilization as Project Fresh, value offers and stronger execution aim to offset weak traffic and cost pressure.

raw.headline: Can Project Fresh Stabilize Wendy's EBITDA Amid Weak Traffic?
raw.summary: WEN targets EBITDA stabilization as Project Fresh, value offers and stronger execution aim to offset weak traffic and cost pressure.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Solid Fundamentals and 2 We Ignore
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

raw.headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Solid Fundamentals and 2 We Ignore
raw.summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: Gas price moderation won’t end restaurant consumer woes
summary: Falling gas prices may not mean a return to consumer health, as wages fall and savings deplete, worsening the gap between restaurant winners and losers.

raw.headline: Gas price moderation won’t end restaurant consumer woes
raw.summary: Falling gas prices may not mean a return to consumer health, as wages fall and savings deplete, worsening the gap between restaurant winners and losers.

headline: Why Did PSKY, MCD, NOC Stocks Tumble To 52-Week Lows Today?
summary: Paramount Skydance, McDonald's, and Northrop Grumman’s shares slumped to annual lows amid legal uncertainty, slowing consumer spending, and margin compression.

raw.headline: Why Did PSKY, MCD, NOC Stocks Tumble To 52-Week Lows Today?
raw.summary: Paramount Skydance, McDonald's, and Northrop Grumman’s shares slumped to annual lows amid legal uncertainty, slowing consumer spending, and margin compression.
